title: Armor All Podium Series™ Hybrid Ceramic High Gloss Tire Shine Spray, 500mL, Long-Lasting Car Tire Shine Developed in Collaboration With Oracle Red Bull Racing
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: DEVELOPED WITH ORACLE RED BULL RACING: One 500mL bottle of Armor All Podium Series Hybrid Ceramic High Gloss Tire Shine Spray, a hybrid ceramic tyre shine spray developed to meet the elite performance standards of the Oracle Red Bull Racing team
LONG-LASTING PROTECTIVE BARRIER: SiO2-based ceramic technology leaves a long-lasting protective barrier
HIGH GLOSS SHINE: Synthetic polymers transform tyres with an intense and durable high gloss shine
SELF-LEVELS WITHOUT DRIPPING: Clings to tyres without dripping and self-levels to a smooth, even finish
LASTS UP TO 4 WEEKS*: High gloss car tyre shine is durable enough to last up to 4 weeks* and can withstand several car washes and rain exposure
PRECISE, EVEN APPLICATION: Precision spray trigger delivers optimized application, ensuring the tyre shine is evenly applied and dries to a high-shine finish that lasts
THE PERFECT LAST STEP IN YOUR WHEEL AND TYRE REGIMEN: This high gloss tyre spray leaves tyres protected and shining, with a warm, bold, and invigorating woody scent
